hooks.command: jq -c '{hook_event_name: .hook_event_name, session_id: .session_id, cwd: .cwd, stop_reason: .stop_reason}' | curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- http://localhost:3456/api/hook

jq -c '{hook_event_name: .hook_event_name, session_id: .session_id, cwd: .cwd, tool_name: .tool_name, error: (.tool_result // "unknown error")}' | curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- http://localhost:3456/api/hook
jq -c '{hook_event_name: .hook_event_name, session_id: .session_id, cwd: .cwd}' | curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- http://localhost:3456/api/hook
